prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Post-tensioning, part of the Structural & Ironwork scope. The observed field condition is: elongation record vs. calculated mismatch (DOC). The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: PTI. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Post-tensioning (commercial project)
